类 DocUrlUtil

java.lang.Object
com.github.hsindumas.stagger.utils.DocUrlUtil
public class DocUrlUtil extends Object
Utility class for handling URL operations related to documentation.

This class provides methods to construct and format URLs. It is not intended to be instantiated.

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    static String
    formatRequestUrl(Map<String,String> pathParamsMap, Map<String,String> queryParamsMap, String serverUrl, String path)
    Formats a request URL with path parameters and query parameters.
    static String
    getMvcUrls(String baseServer, String baseUrl, String shortUrl)
    Convenience method to construct a formatted URL based on the provided base server, base URL, and a short URL.
    static String
    getMvcUrls(String baseServer, String baseUrl, List<String> urls)
    Constructs a list of formatted URLs based on the provided base server, base URL, and a list of URLs.

    从类继承的方法 Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • 方法详细资料

    • getMvcUrls

      public static String getMvcUrls(String baseServer, String baseUrl, List<String> urls)
      Constructs a list of formatted URLs based on the provided base server, base URL, and a list of URLs.
      参数:
      baseServer - The base server URL.
      baseUrl - The base URL segment.
      urls - A list of URL segments to append.
      返回:
      A concatenated string of simplified URLs separated by a predefined separator.

    • getMvcUrls

      public static String getMvcUrls(String baseServer, String baseUrl, String shortUrl)
      Convenience method to construct a formatted URL based on the provided base server, base URL, and a short URL.
      参数:
      baseServer - The base server URL.
      baseUrl - The base URL segment.
      shortUrl - A short URL to split and process.
      返回:
      A formatted URL.

    • formatRequestUrl

      public static String formatRequestUrl(Map<String,String> pathParamsMap, Map<String,String> queryParamsMap, String serverUrl, String path)
      Formats a request URL with path parameters and query parameters.
      参数:
      pathParamsMap - A map of path parameters.
      queryParamsMap - A map of query parameters.
      serverUrl - The server URL.
      path - The path to be formatted.
      返回:
      A fully constructed and simplified request URL.
